search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Restricted to lastzwiki.com only. Prioritized concrete guide pages over generic home pages. No public-facing mechanic claim should be treated as verified from a single page.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster and equipment page with character list, faction filters, levels, and gear stats; good for hero discovery and cross-checking hero names.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster, faction groupings, and basic hero gear data.
claims_to_verify: Equipment stat lines and item types

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page showing laboratory categories and per-level badge costs; useful for finding research paths and cost tables.
results.primary_user_job: Find research categories and badge cost tables.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Main hub linking to heroes, research, combat, alliance, and beginner guides; useful as a navigation entry point.
claims_to_verify: Category list shown on the hub

search_records.no_results_reason: No search hits on the allowed domain for the provided query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to lastz.fandom.com. Best leads were event and hero overview pages; the query also surfaced a hero/research-related event page. No claim should be treated as final from a single page.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle includes an Age of Science theme for technology research and a Hero Initiative theme for hero leveling and recruitment items.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks tied to research and hero growth.
claims_to_verify: Points for research, hero upgrades, and tickets

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero index page; describes hero classes and the main hero power factors used for cross-checking hero growth mechanics.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero roster and stat growth concepts.
claims_to_verify: Relationship between hero upgrades and power

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events; useful entry point for locating event tabs and reset cadence.
results.primary_user_job: Locate event categories and access points.

search_records.search_notes: Search completed with domain restriction to www.packsify.com. No matching pages were found for the requested guide/query within the allowed source domain and freshness window.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed packsify.com pages matched the specified Last Z gear guide query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com and focused on Last Z: Survival Shooter pages. Results prioritize concrete guide/event pages over generic or community-only pages.

results.title: BLNW (BALKAN NETWORK) - Last Z: Survival Shooter Alliance
results.evidence_summary: Alliance hub page for a Last Z server group; useful for social context, not mechanics verification.

results.title: Zombie Siege Event Guide: HQ Defense & Reinforcement Strategy | Last Z
results.evidence_summary: Event guide describing Zombie Siege duration, knockout rule, and alliance survival objectives.
results.primary_user_job: learn event rules and team strategy

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Building guide for Shooter Camp training, cap, speed, unlock requirements, and progression table.
